list.headline: Study material, ready when you sit down.
list.description: Keep PDFs, notes, summaries, and recall cards in a quiet reading room instead of the old dashboard shell.
list.addSourceDescription: Upload PDF, DOCX, or TXT files and turn them into readable summaries and flashcards.
list.continueDocumentDescription: {{name}} is ready for its next study step.
list.loadError: Document shelf could not refresh. Try again in a moment.
list.emptyDescription: Upload a document to create your first summary and review deck.
list.noMatchesDescription: Try another filter or clear the search field.

flow.uploadDescription: Upload PDF, DOCX, or TXT from one clear entry point.
flow.readDescription: Open the source, generate a summary, or continue where you stopped.
flow.reviewDescription: Turn the same document into cards and review from the shelf.

uploadPage.title: Add an AI document
uploadPage.description: Drop source material into the desk. FocusOS will keep the upload flow simple and ready for study.
uploadPage.chooseAria: Choose an AI document file to upload
uploadPage.dropDescription: or browse your computer for PDF, DOCX, or TXT up to 10 MB
uploadPage.nextStepDescription: Choose where this document should land next.

nextStepDescriptions.flashcards: Open deck generation for review cards.
nextStepDescriptions.library: Return to the shelf and decide later.

uploadPage.unsupported: Upload a PDF, DOCX, or TXT file.
uploadPage.tooLarge: File must be 10 MB or smaller.

uploadModal.title: Add AI document
uploadModal.description: PDF, DOCX, or TXT up to 10 MB.
uploadModal.dropBrowse: Drop file here or click to browse
uploadModal.unsupported: Only PDF, DOCX, and TXT files are supported.
uploadModal.tooLarge: File must be 10 MB or smaller.

detail.title: Document study
detail.summaryStarted: Summary generation has started. This can take a moment.
detail.summaryEmpty: No summary exists yet. Generate one when you are ready.
detail.flashcardsEmpty: No flashcards are available yet. Generate a deck to begin review.

reader.title: Source reader
reader.loadError: Document source could not be loaded.
reader.emptyText: No readable text was extracted from this file.
reader.unsupported: This file type cannot be previewed yet.

generation.documentNotReady: This document is {{status}}. Wait until extraction finishes before generating.
generation.summaryHelp: Pick the reading depth before FocusOS builds the summary.
generation.flashcardsHelp: Choose a deck size that fits the next review block.
generation.afterGenerate: After generation, the result opens in this document.
generation.shortDescription: Key points for a quick read.
